---
title: OPTIMUM Trial Report
author:
  - name: James Totterdell
    email: james.totterdell@sydney.edu.au
date: last-modified
number-sections: true
---

# Introduction

This is the trial report for OPTIMUM reporting on clinical outcomes.

# Baseline

Why does this not work?

{{< embed  notebooks/baseline-summary.qmd#fig-enrolment-overall >}}

{{< embed  notebooks/baseline-summary.qmd#tbl-baseline-characteristics >}}

{{< embed  notebooks/baseline-summary.qmd#tbl-discharge-outcome >}}


# Outcomes

### Skin prick tests (secondary)

{{< embed notebooks/outcomes.qmd#tbl-spt-outcomes >}}

### Eczema (secondary)

### Food allergy (primary)
